name: Fried Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 5-6 zucchini - cut either steak fries style or in ¼ inch disks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beaten egg, milk, flour, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish.
2. If the batter is too thick, add water; if it's too thin, add more flour until you have a smooth consistency that coats a fork.
3. Dip the zucchini slices or fries into the batter.
4. Heat oil for deep-frying in a pan over medium-high heat.
5. Carefully lower the battered zucchini into the hot oil and fry until the batter turns crispy.
6. Remove from oil using tongs and drain on paper towels.
7. Serve with prepared tsatsiki sauce.
